scenarios.starting_prompt: setup context generation for my database.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to setup the auto context generation for my alloydb database. Connection information: datasource name as my-alloydb, project id is cloud-db-nl2sql, region us-central1, cluster whaoyu-test, instance whaoyu-test-primary, database financial. Verify the agent generate a valid tools.yaml. Explicitly ask the agent to perform validation. You should terminate the conversation immediately after the agent successfully set up the files and performed the validation.

scenarios.starting_prompt: What skills and MCP tools do you have available?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to list all the skills and MCP tools it currently has available. The agent should enumerate the db-context-engineering skills (e.g., autoctx:init, autoctx:generate-dataset, autoctx:bootstrap, autoctx:evaluate, autoctx:hillclimb, context-generation-guide) and the db-context-engineering MCP tools (e.g., generate_dataset, generate_evalbench_configs, generate_upload_url, mutate_context_set, read_evaluation_result). Terminate the conversation immediately after the agent provides the list.
